mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation (user_id, character_id, title, last_message, last_msg_at, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{characterId}, #{title}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastMsgAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET last_message = #{last}, last_msg_at = #{lastAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, character_id, title, last_message, last_msg_at, create_time, update_time FROM conversation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.character_id, c.title, c.last_message, c.last_msg_at, c.update_time, a.name AS character_name, a.image_url AS character_avatar FROM conversation c LEFT JOIN ai_character a ON c.character_id = a.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.last_msg_at, c.update_time) DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET user_id = #{userId}, character_id = #{characterId}, title = #{title}, last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_msg_at = #{lastMsgAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
